name: JFK Transportation
fmcsa_address: 980 W 17th St Suite B, Santa Ana, CA 92706
notes: JFK Transportation Co., Inc. address matches input exactly (980 W 17th St #B Santa Ana CA 92706). Family-owned by Watson family, operating since 1993 per company website although CA corporate incorporation filed 2003-09-09. Intrastate carrier - no MC number (not federally authorized for-hire interstate). 195 power units / 160 drivers per SAFER (MCS-150 filed 2025-01-03, 800,000 miles reported 2024).

name: Medride Corp
inc_date: 2001 (operating since; OK SOS filing date not directly verified)
registry_source: FMCSA SAFER; Oklahoma Secretary of State business entity database not directly fetched (sos.ok.gov)
notes: Address matches input exactly. Medride Corporation (also d/b/a MedRide/Oklahoma Critical Care Transport, MedRide Assisted Transportation) provides wheelchair, non-emergency medical, and special needs transportation since 2001. 61 power units / 49 drivers per FMCSA SAFER. No safety rating assigned; zero crashes/inspections reported in 24-month window. Not primarily a school bus operator - more NEMT/paratransit, though serves special needs students.
